name: Ralph Marterie
abstract: Ralph Marterie (24 December 1914 – 10 October 1978) was an Italian big-band leader born in Acerra (near Naples), Italy.

concerts.label: Nat King Cole, Sarah Vaughan, Ralph Marterie, and Illinois Jacquet
Midnight Performance: Nat King Cole, Sarah Vaughan, Ralph Marterie, and Illinois Jacquet

about_quotes.speaker: Horace Henderson
about_quotes.evidence: Then Ralph Marteri and his trumpet, and another guy that just passed recently, Ben Pollock. He had a nightclub in Palm Springs for quite some time. I read about this.

about_quotes.speaker: Horace Henderson
about_quotes.evidence: I made some things for him... I just was freelancing. I made these things, and he liked them
